507 O0300A_PPV_CD O0300A_PPV_CD O0300A Pneumococcal Vaccination Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received a pneumococcal vaccine. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
508 O0300B_RSN_PPV_NOT_RCVD_CD O0300B_RSN_PPV_NOT_RCVD_CD O0300B Reason Pneumococcal Vaccination Not Received Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the reason that the resident did not receive the pneumococcal vaccine. -=Not assessed/no
